violations.text: Establishment is lacking drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice dispenser have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Chemicals (motor oil) was stored on the same shelf with food (creamer) in the dry storage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Ice cream and drinks observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Utensils in the coffee area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer (fruit) has an accumulation of frost buildup. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
